entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The target crop for production and resistance breeding, including species O. sativa and O. glaberrima

entities.name: ROOT-KNOT NEMATODE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of rice to resist infection by Meloidogyne graminicola

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of rice, which is reduced by nematode infection

entities.name: BSA-SEQ
entities.description: Bulked Segregant Analysis sequencing used to map resistance genes

entities.name: TRADITIONAL MAPPING
entities.description: Conventional genetic mapping used to identify genomic regions associated with traits

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach using genetic markers to select for desired traits

entities.name: FINE MAPPING
entities.description: A high-resolution mapping technique to narrow down the genomic region of a gene

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 6
entities.description: A genomic region containing a major locus for root-knot nematode resistance

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 2
entities.description: A genomic region containing a minor QTL for root-knot nematode resistance

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 4
entities.description: A genomic region containing a minor QTL for root-knot nematode resistance

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Putative genes within the QTL regions that may be responsible for resistance

entities.name: DIRECT-SEEDED WATER-SAVING RICE PRODUCTION
entities.description: A cropping system that favors the development of Meloidogyne graminicola

entities.name: MELOIDOGYNE GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: A root-knot nematode that acts as a threat to rice production

entities.name: BC1F1 POPULATION
entities.description: The specific plant population derived from a cross used for genetic mapping

entities.name: NON-SYNONYMOUS VARIANTS
entities.description: Genetic variations that change the amino acid sequence of a protein
